name: nkz-module-gis-routing
description: Interactive routing wizard with real-time SVG preview, multi-strategy A-B guidance lines, VRA prescription maps, A-B least-cost pathfinding on Cesium, pattern persistence, and ISOBUS export for autonomous tractors. Includes mobile handoff with WatermelonDB offline sync.
short_description: Interactive routing wizard, VRA prescriptions, pathfinding on Cesium, and ISOBUS export
label: GIS Routing & VRA

features: Interactive routing wizard with real-time SVG preview and hover/click line highlighting
Multi-strategy routing: AB-line, AB-skip (seeding), spiral (harvesting), headland with composition
VRA prescription maps with vegetation-health auto-fetch and rate smoothing
A-B least-cost pathfinding with point picker on Cesium 3D map (3 weighted alternatives)
Field pattern persistence: save, load, and compare saved routes per parcel
Headland passes composition (perimeter circuits + internal swaths in one plan)
Mobile handoff with WatermelonDB offline sync for field execution
6 languages: Catalan, English, Spanish, Basque, French, Portuguese
